response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong generalist engineering skills and leadership in software craftsmanship, but lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated high-stakes environments. His recent work in AI-agent tooling is promising but not at the scale or domain depth required for this role. The resume shows versatility but does not highlight the critical technical depth in distributed systems, real-time AI inference, or fintech compliance needed for a CTO at a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Strong engineering leadership and team scaling experience in high-growth tech companies
Hands-on expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing
Proven ability to contribute to AI-adjacent tooling and developer infrastructure (e.g., MCP frameworks)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems or agentic frameworks in fintech contexts
Limited exposure to regulated financial environments, credit systems, or compliance infrastructure
Lacks direct experience with real-time credit risk, working-capital optimization, or trade decisioning systems
